# Process Reliabilism

**Node Type:** synthesis
**Node ID:** 5b7fc947-d4d6-47bd-848b-fde2d7945cc7
**Depth:** 5
**Terminal:** No

**Parent:** [Can knowledge be entirely independent of intellectual character virtues?](can-knowledge-be-entirely-independent-of-intellectual-character-virtues-antithesis-4901f71e-3c15-4cd9-a74b-9891636f1050.md)

## Content

**Knowledge is true belief produced by reliable processes**, **A belief is justified if it is generated by a reliable cognitive process**, **No requirement for intellectual virtues or character traits for knowledge**, **Reliable processes are those that typically yield a high ratio of true beliefs to false beliefs**
